name: Sauteed Shredded Zucchini with Browned Onions
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Grated zucchini, excess moisture squeezed out
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a heavy skillet (preferably cast iron) over medium-high heat.
2. Add the chopped onions to the skillet and stir frequently to prevent sticking. Cook until golden brown, about 7-9 minutes. Remove from the skillet and transfer to a small bowl.
3. Wipe out the skillet with a paper towel. Return the skillet to the heat and add the olive oil. When the oil is hot and coating the bottom of the skillet, add the grated zucchini.
4. Saute the zucchini for 1-2 minutes, until heated through. Add the browned onions, salt, and pepper. Stir.
5. Transfer the mixture to a serving bowl.
